title: gnaphalium retortum
intro: Gnaphalium retortum, also known as the bent or twisted cudweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gnaphalium retortum include its ability to act as an antiseptic, reducing the risk of infection, and its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Gnaphalium retortum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment, allowing for various forms of administration to suit individual needs.
